raw_consumer_statement:
Subject : Complaint Against Citibank ( Costco Card ) for Denial of Fraudulent Transaction Claims Citi Costco Credit Card I am filing this complaint against Citibank regarding unauthorized and fraudulent transactions on my Citi Costco Anywhere Visa Card, which the bank has improperly denied after dispute. 

Between XX/XX/year>, and XX/XX/year>, multiple unauthorized transactions were made on my credit card at various Costco warehouse locations in USA. I did not authorize, participate in, or benefit from any of these transactions. I was not physically present in these locations at the time. 

Below is a summary of the fraudulent transactions : XX/XX/year> XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX  {$340.00} XX/XX/year> XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX {$360.00} XX/XX/year> XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX {$420.00} XX/XX/scrub>XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX {$230.00} XX/XX/year> XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXXXXXX XXXX XXXXXXXX XXXX {$340.00} XX/XX/year> XXXXXXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXXXXXX XXXX {$390.00} XX/XX/year> XXXXXXXX XXXX XXXX XXXXXXXX XXXX XXXX {$440.00} XX/XX/year> XXXX XXXX XXXX  XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX {$220.00} XX/XX/year> XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXXXXXX XXXX XXXX CA {$300.00} XX/XX/year> XXXXXXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX {$420.00} XX/XX/year> XXXXXXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXXXXXX XXXX {$450.00} XX/XX/year> XXXXXXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX  XXXX XXXX  {$1.00} XX/XX/year> XXXXXXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXXXXXX XXXX  {$260.00} XX/XX/year> XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX  {$320.00} XX/XX/year> XXXXXXXX XXXX XXXX XXXXXXXX XXXX XXXX  {$330.00} The total fraudulent amount exceeds {$4800.00}. 

I reported these transactions promptly to Citibank and filed a dispute. However, my claim was denied without adequate explanation or supporting evidence. Citibank has failed to provide documentation from the merchant or any proof that I authorized these transactions. 

This pattern of transactions clearly indicates fraud : Multiple transactions across different cities within short timeframes Transactions occurring in locations where I was not present Repeated high-value charges in rapid succession I am requesting the following actions : Immediate reversal of all fraudulent charges Full reimbursement of all disputed amounts Written explanation of the basis for denial Copies of all documents and evidence used in the investigation I respectfully request the CFPB to investigate this matter and ensure that Citibank complies with its obligations to protect consumers from fraud. 

Sincerely, XXXX XXXX
